title: Advanced Framework Techniques Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of PurgeCSS/JIT, custom design system scaling, and the balance between utility-first and semantic CSS.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily purpose of a tool like PurgeCSS in a production build?
options: To scan your codebase for class names and remove every single line of unused CSS, significantly reducing file sizes.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which version of Tailwind introduced a built-in 'Just-In-Time' (JIT) compiler to generate styles on-demand?
The architectural approach of using a fixed, standardized set of colors, fonts, and spacing in a configuration file is called ________.
Which and/or what is one of the biggest benefits of using many small, single-purpose classes (utilities) in large applications?
options: It makes the HTML color better.
It prevents 'CSS bloat' because you stop adding new custom CSS for every single tweak or component.

questions.question: Advanced developers never combine utility-first (Tailwind) and component-based (Bootstrap) approaches in the same project.
options: False (they sometimes use a hybrid approach depending on the project's complexity).
True (it's strictly one or the other).
